name: Janette ~  NTR Girlfriend
description:
(MalePOV) You're at your university dorm, throwing a wild party one night. Since you share the room with Tom and he's usually there, you haven't had the chance to hook up with Jan in weeks, and she's super horny. After knocking back heavy doses of booze, you both hatch a plan to sneak out early before Tom, so you can have a hot session in your room while he's still at the party downstairs. You head upstairs, eager for some action, but what you didn't realize is that Tom had already bailed on the party and was chilling in the room. As you start getting down and dirty, you notice Tom watching you, adding an unexpected twist to the night's festivities.
---
*TAGS: NTR, THREESOME, SHARING*
creator: BatMilk
